memoryArtifacts.description: The indent of John Thwaites of Denton and Isabella, daughter of Sir William Ryther and Sybil Aldburgh, whose monument is nearby. The brasses have been missing for over 3 and a half centuries. Thwaites …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Ryther於1408年出生時，她的父親Sir William Ryther II29歲，母親Maud Umfraville26歲。她和Sir John Thwaites至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1483年享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Ryther于1408年出生时，她的父亲Sir William Ryther II29岁，母亲Maud Umfraville26岁。她和Sir John Thwaites至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1483年享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ryther
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of German Reither, a variant of Reiter .

variants.name: Reiter
meanings: occupational name for a mounted soldier or knight, from Middle Low German rider, Middle High German rīter ‘rider’. It is also found in some central European countries, e.g. in Czechia and Slovenia. Compare Raiter .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Ryther was born in 1408, her father, Sir William Ryther II, was 29 and her mother, Maud Umfraville, was 26. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Sir John Thwaites. She died in 1483, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Ryther est née en 1408, son père, Sir William Ryther II, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Maud Umfraville, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Sir John Thwaites. Elle est décédée en 1483, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Ryther 1408 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Ryther II 29 und ihre Mutter Maud Umfraville 26. Sie hatte mit Sir John Thwaites mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1483 im Alter von 75 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Ryther è nata il nel 1408, sua padre, Sir William Ryther II, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Maud Umfraville, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Sir John Thwaites. Morì nel 1483, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Rytherが1408年に生まれた時，父Sir William Ryther IIは29歳，母Maud Umfravilleは26歳であった。彼女はSir John Thwaitesとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1483年に75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Ryther(이)가 1408년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Ryther II(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Umfraville(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Thwaites(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1483년 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Ryther nasceu em 1408, seu pai, Sir William Ryther II, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Maud Umfraville, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Sir John Thwaites. Ela faleceu em 1483, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Ryther родилась в 1408 г., её отцу по имени Sir William Ryther II было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Umfraville, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Sir John Thwaites. Она умерла в 1483 г. в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Ryther nació en 1408, su papá, Sir William Ryther II, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Maud Umfraville, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Sir John Thwaites. Murió en 1483, a la edad de 75 años.
